title: Improved Beacons
description: Improves the functionality of beacons, adding more layers with additional effects, and ways to increase their range.
body:
Adds more layers to beacons, with more effects to choose from, and the possibility to increase its range by using rarer blocks.

Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) (for versions 0.2.2 and above).

For servers, mod is required on both sides. If installed only server-side, a player can receive buffs from an already activated beacon, but will be kicked when trying to interact with the beacon. (TODO vanilla compatiblity)

# Features
- Increased maximum layers to 6
  - Unlocks Luck effect at layer 5
  - Unlocks Health Boost effect at layer 6
- Increased range based on composition of pyramid (up to 16 chunks)
  - Radius is __(1 + 3 * power/100) * (layers * 8 + 16)__, where power is the average power of the pyramid (iron = 0, gold = 37, diamond/emerald = 50, netherite = 100)
  - For example, a pyramid made entirely out of iron blocks will have power 0, a pyramid made out of 50% iron and 50% netherite will have power 50, and a pyramid made entirely out of netherite will have power 100.

# Mod conflicts
This mod is probably incompatible with mods that also modify the Beacon.
